title: Senior Business Development Manager at Sobha Developers Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Senior Business Development Manager at Sobha Developers Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
We at Sobha Developers Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Sobha Developers Holdings Services:
Sobha Developers Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sobha Developers Holdings Services!
